notes: Edge case where context_packet.commands and context_packet.logs tell conflicting stories. The request cites 'npm test failure' and provides failure.log, but workspace inspection shows package.json has no test script and failure.log timestamps match `bun test` invocations in .github/workflows/ci.yml. The contract must reconcile this by citing the ACTUAL command (`bun test`) in context_packet.commands, documenting the discrepancy in a context_packet.files[].why note for the log, and including ci.yml to ground the correction. Tests fidelity to workspace evidence over request prose when they conflict. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
